---
title: "NIST Explainable AI Workshop"
description: "Today: NIST Explainable AI Workshop."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-01-26"
categories: [AI, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![NIST Explainable AI Workshop. Image from [NIST](https://www.nist.gov/news-events/events/2021/01/explainable-ai-workshop).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Today: NIST Explainable AI Workshop

<https://www.nist.gov/news-events/events/2021/01/explainable-ai-workshop>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_explainableai-ai-nist-activity-6759870797487181824-drKH).*
